Step 5: Analyze Surface. Available ontop sites: Ni, Sc, Te. Bridge: Ni-Sc, Sc-Sc, Sc-Te. Hollow-3: Sc-Sc-Sc, Sc-Sc-Te. Hollow-4: Sc-Sc-Sc-Te, Sc-Sc-Te-Te. Plan for existing combinations.
Step 6: Formulate Plan. Start with ontop Ni, as Ni is a transition metal likely to form strong bonds with O in OH radical. adsorbate_type: ReactiveSpecies (radical). site_type: ontop. surface_binding_atoms: ['Ni']. adsorbate_binding_indices: [0] (O with radical).
